scenarios.title: Recommendation stress collects observations after readiness

gherkin.given: the disposable stress stack is healthy and the Go stress readiness canary has passed for core, database, NATS, and auth
gherkin.when: the recommendation stress profile runs 50 concurrent warm reactive requests
gherkin.then: the workload records at least one observation and the output includes total sample counts plus latency/error summaries

scenarios.title: Warm reactive stress keeps the parent latency contract

gherkin.given: fixture-backed recommendation providers and the reactive recommendation API are available in the stress stack
gherkin.when: the warm reactive stress profile completes
gherkin.then: p95 latency is within the 10 second warm budget, unexpected error rate remains within threshold, and provider runtime state remains reachable

scenarios.title: Worker timeout outcomes are not silently dropped

gherkin.given: concurrent recommendation workers hit deadline, timeout, transport, server, or unexpected-status paths
gherkin.when: the stress harness aggregates worker outcomes
gherkin.then: each outcome is counted or reported as a workload diagnostic and the test cannot fail only with zero samples and no classified observations
